data.description: Ken Kesey’s younger brother transformed a former creamery into Nancy’s Probiotic Foods.

data.title: Carnegie Learning’s ClearMath Elementary gets perfect scores in new report by EdReports, a leader in educational evaluations.
data.description: In Pittsburgh, Carnegie Learning, a prominent company in AI-driven educational solutions for K-12, revealed that its ClearMath Elementary program for K-5 math achieved a flawless rating in a recent assessment by EdReports, a reputable non-profit organization that assesses educational resources. EdReports evaluates materials based on their emphasis, consistency, difficulty, and practicality. This recognition highlights the effectiveness of Carnegie Learning's elementary math program in supporting students' learning.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures remain bullish with Tesla leading 5 stocks in buy areas; AI giants and Fed meeting ahead.
data.description: The ongoing bullish market trend is pushing towards new highs, with Tesla being one of the stocks showing promising buy potential. As the Federal Reserve meeting approaches along with the presence of major artificial intelligence companies, such as AI giants, investors are keen on these developments. Notably, Dow Jones Futures indicate that the bullish trend remains strong. Tesla stands out as one of the top performers, leading the way for five stocks that are currently in favorable buy areas.

data.title: Stock market climbs with Nasdaq and S&P 500 extending win streaks. Ulta Beauty breaks out of a base.
data.description: Today, the stock market saw an increase as the Dow Jones index and other major indexes closed higher. Ulta Beauty stock showed a significant increase after breaking out of a base. The Nasdaq and S&P 500 extended their winning streaks. Palantir outperformed Nvidia in today's trading session. This live coverage of the stock market highlights the positive performance with important indexes and individual stocks showing gains.

data.title: Cohu to attend 14th Annual NYC Summit Investor Conference on Dec 16, 2025 at Mastro’s New York. Presentation material on website www.cohu.com.
data.description: A company specializing in semiconductor manufacturing optimization, Cohu, Inc. (NASDAQ: COHU), will have its management take part in the 14th Annual NYC Summit Investor Conference at Mastro’s New York on December 16, 2025. The presentation material used during the event will be available on the investor section of the company’s official website at www.cohu.com. This conference provides investors with insights into the company's performance and future plans.

data.title: Copper Property CTL Trust reports $6.8M distribution, $0.090060 per certificate. Dec. 10 payout for Dec. 9 record holders.
data.description: The Trust, known as Copper Property CTL Pass Through Trust, has submitted a Form 8-K with its monthly report covering the period ending on November 30, 2025. A total distribution of $6.8 million, equivalent to $0.090060 per trust certificate, is set to be disbursed on December 10, 2025, to certificateholders listed on December 9, 2025. Interested parties can access more details, such as the Trust’s Monthly and Quarterly Reports, along with additional filings with the Securities and Exchange Commission.

data.title: New Jersey American Water issues statewide conservation notice as NJ DEP declares Drought Warning on Dec. 5, 2025.
data.description: In response to the Drought Warning issued by the New Jersey Department of Environmental Protection (NJ DEP) on December 5, 2025, a company based in Camden, New Jersey, has strongly advised its customers to conserve water. The NJ DEP's warning emphasizes the urgent need for water conservation measures due to the current water shortage. The company's initiative aims to encourage customers to reduce their water usage significantly. This comes as a crucial step to address the challenges posed by the drought situation. Residents are urged to take immediate action to save water as the state grapples with this environmental concern. It is essential for the community to actively participate in water conservation efforts, with key focus on reducing water usage by a significant percentage.

data.title: Blue Water Acquisition Corp. IV, founded by Joseph Hernandez, files $125M IPO registration with SEC.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, in Greenwich, Connecticut, Blue Water Acquisition Corp. IV revealed the submission of a registration statement on Form S-1 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The Company is a recently established special purpose acquisition company.

data.title: Birks Group Inc. reports $93.1M in net sales & $36.5M gross profit for the 26-week period ending Sept 27, 2025, up 16.2% from last year. CEO credits strong retail performance & European acquisition for growth.
data.description: Birks Group Inc. reported their financial results for the twenty-six-week period ending September 27, 2025. They had net sales of $93.1 million, a 16.2% increase from the prior year. Comparable store sales increased by 6.3%. Gross profit was $36.5 million, a 16.7% increase, with a gross profit margin of 39.2%. SG&A expenses were $33.0 million, representing 35.4% of net sales. EBITDA was $4.8 million, and the operating loss was $0.2 million. The company reported a net loss of $2.6 million for the period. The increase in expenses was partially attributed to the acquisition of European Boutique. The Chairman praised the strong retail performance and product offerings, thanking the employees for their efforts.

data.title: Birks Group Inc. (NYSE American: BGI) reports Q2 Fiscal 2026 results with $93.1 million in net sales, up 16.2% from Q2 Fiscal 2025.
data.description: Birks Group Inc. (NYSE American: BGI) announced its financial results for the twenty-six-week period concluding on September 27, 2025. The Company reported net sales of $93.1 million in Canadian dollars during Fiscal 2026, showing a 16.2% increase from the same stretch in Fiscal 2025, which amounted to an additional $13.0 million. The figures were disclosed without specifying the source, with the announcement provided from Montreal.

data.title: Ventas to participate in Nareit’s REITworld 2025 Annual Conference on Dec 8-9; Written materials available on website.
data.description: Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) based in Chicago, revealed that its management will attend investor meetings at Nareit’s REITworld 2025 Annual Conference on December 8-9, 2025. The Company will present written materials for the event on its website starting at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on Monday, December 8, 2025. The materials will also be stored in the ir.ven archives.

data.title: Wall Street favors MSTR stock - analysts most active or inaccurate about it. Top choice.
data.description: The company MSTR is currently the favored stock among Wall Street analysts, despite also being one that they have often miscalculated on. This particular stock, under the ticker symbol MSTR, stands out as the top choice for analysts. The post highlights that Wall Street's sentiment towards MSTR is notably strong, with analysts closely tracking its performance. It is considered a prominent choice within the financial community. The article emphasizes the unique position of MSTR within the stock market, particularly in relation to the views and predictions of Wall Street analysts.

data.title: Praxis Precision Medicines stock jumps 31% to a 3-year high after halting epilepsy study early for strong results.
data.description: Shares of Praxis Precision Medicines soared on Friday following the company's decision to halt an epilepsy study prematurely due to its remarkable effectiveness. The unexpected success resulted in a 31% surge in Praxis's stock, reaching a new three-year high.
Fitch Ratings: revised outlook on Hungary's long-term foreign currency issuer default rating to negative from stable and affirmed issuer default rating at bbb

data.title: Power Integrations grants 62,333 RSUs and 1,427 PSUs to new chief people officer; RSUs vest over 3 years.
data.description: In San José, California, Power Integrations, Inc. disclosed that on December 1, 2025, they awarded 62,333 restricted stock units (RSUs) and 1,427 performance stock units (PSUs) to Julie Currie. Currie assumed the role of chief people and transformation officer for the company in November 2025. These grants were provided under Power Integrations’ 2025 Inducement Award Plan. The RSUs are set to vest yearly over a three-year period, contingent on Currie's ongoing tenure with the company.
